global_description: A small, slender songbird with an olive-green back and yellow underparts. It has a pointed beak and a distinctive eye stripe. The wings and tail are short and rounded, with subtle streaks.

part_details.beak: Short, pointed, and slightly curved, dark in color.
part_details.eye_stripe: Thin, pale stripe running from the beak through the eye.
part_details.wings: Short, rounded, olive-green with subtle streaks.
part_details.tail: Short, rounded, matching the wing color.

spatial_relations: The eye stripe runs horizontally across the face.
The wings are attached to the sides of the body, slightly below the back.
The tail extends from the rear of the body, aligned with the wings.
